ranking_evidence_legend.base_mode: Base retrieval path that produced initial score: fts5, regex_structural_scan, vector, hybrid, or graph_expand.
ranking_evidence_legend.exact_name_match: Result name exactly matched query text.
ranking_evidence_legend.exact_qualified_name_match: Result qualified_name exactly matched query text.
ranking_evidence_legend.final_score: Final score after boosts, graph expansion, or hybrid fusion.
ranking_evidence_legend.fuzzy: Fuzzy correction metadata: corrected_term, edit_distance, and fuzzy_threshold.
ranking_evidence_legend.graph_expansion: Graph expansion metadata: hop_distance and seed_qualified_name.
ranking_evidence_legend.hybrid_rrf: Hybrid fusion metadata: per-source rank and reciprocal-rank score contribution.
ranking_evidence_legend.kind_boost: Boost from preferred symbol kind ranking.
ranking_evidence_legend.matched_fields: Fields that directly matched query evidence such as name, qualified_name, file_path, content, or embedding.
ranking_evidence_legend.prefix_match: Result name matched query text as prefix.
ranking_evidence_legend.raw_score: Score before later ranking boosts or merges when available.
ranking_evidence_legend.recent_file_boost: Boost from recently indexed file status.
ranking_evidence_legend.same_directory_boost: Boost from same-directory proximity to reference file.
ranking_evidence_legend.same_language_boost: Boost from same-language proximity to reference language.
